conditions.name: Bleeding
conditions.rules: 1d4 dmg/turn start. +1 die/stack. Ends: healed or roll 1 on dmg die.

conditions.name: Blinded
conditions.rules: Strain on attacks & physical checks. All foes Obscured.

conditions.name: Burning
conditions.rules: 1d6 fire dmg to Vitality+Ambition/turn. +1 die/stack. Can't hide. Ends: Aid action or roll 1.

conditions.name: Charmed
conditions.rules: Can't act hostile vs source. Will save on dmg or turn start.

conditions.name: Compelled
conditions.rules: Strain on attacks vs non-source. Will save vs source Will each turn.

conditions.name: Crippled
conditions.rules: AP -1. Ends: magical heal or Medicine check.

conditions.name: Dazed
conditions.rules: Mind checks & attacks -2. Stacks/sustains.

conditions.name: Deafened
conditions.rules: Auto-fail hearing Investigation. Immune to auditory effects.

conditions.name: Dominated
conditions.rules: Charmed + must obey source. Will save on dmg or turn end.

conditions.name: Enraged
conditions.rules: Can't focus sustained spells. Ends: no dmg before group's next turn.

conditions.name: Frightened
conditions.rules: Strain on attacks vs source & Will/Essence/Vigor checks. Ends: Will save, source leaves sight.

conditions.name: Immobilized
conditions.rules: Can't Dash or Disengage. Can still Flank if already engaged.

conditions.name: Inert
conditions.rules: Can't spend AP. Can speak/gesture/reposition if not engaged. Ends: own turn end.

conditions.name: Maimed
conditions.rules: Max Vitality -25%. Can't regain Vitality. Ends: Full Rest or cure effect.

conditions.name: Poisoned
conditions.rules: Strain on targeted attribute checks (default: Brawn). Extra stacks hit more attrs.

conditions.name: Prone
conditions.rules: Fortitude -5. Can't reposition/Dash freely. Stand costs 1 AP. Stealth +3.

conditions.name: Restrained
conditions.rules: No Dash/Dodge/Disengage/Flank. Moves with restrainer. Ends: Brawn check vs restrainer Fortitude.

conditions.name: Sapped
conditions.rules: Dmg dealt -1d10.

conditions.name: Silenced
conditions.rules: Can't speak or use verbal components.

conditions.name: Stunned
conditions.rules: Max AP becomes 2.

conditions.name: Unconscious
conditions.rules: Prone + can't spend AP. Roll 1d20 on turn start or dmg taken; 10+ ends it.

conditions.name: Weakened
conditions.rules: All stats & defenses -1/stack. Max 4 stacks. At 5: Inert. -1 stack/rest.
